narrative:
Precinct New Riegel Village (precinct in Seneca County) has 164 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.8 percentage points.
